sections.paragraph: χρηστότης, ητος, ἡ [χρηστός] ‘quality of having a high level of usefulness’, understood in the Mediterranean world as an important factor in maintaining a well-ordered society, kindness, generosity, goodness Ro 3:12; 9:23 v.l.; 11:22; 2 Cor 6:6; Gal 5:22; Eph 2:7; Col 3:12; Tit 3:4. W. focus on moral aspect Ro 2:4.
